content:
Currently I feel like there's no reason to play the side modes Hectic Skyboumd Rail(HSR) and P-Dive more than maybe 3 times for the basic season rewards and a high score.

The issue: I started playing the game about 2~3ish months ago, and I'm already at arc 2 chapter 5, and currently I'm on the Gacha stage where I have to wait until each game reset to get the materials needed to upgrade skills, breakthrough level caps, get free pulls, etc...
And now I have basically no reason to really interact with the gameplay since I can't beat the later stages of the story and the 1 other mode that allows me to really make use of my teams is D-Tide that I can at max do 8 runs and then is back on waiting 2 weeks for a reset.
I did also play a lot of the side stories, but due to the Reality Verge scarcity I can only do more, again, only after waiting a few days.
The other modes of the game, as mentioned in the first paragraph, are completely useless for a month after doing 3 runs on them, which further exacerbates the issue of having no reason to play the game for more than 5 minutes daily.
I would like there to be a reason for me to spend more time actually playing and having fun with the progress I made in the game. Simply playing for the sake of playing in a gacha game feels like a waste of time.

My suggestion: Have some rewards for the modes HSR and P-Dive that rewards the player for spending the time and resources needed to beat its harder modes.
My idea is to have as reward some form of shard for certain resources, like how the Gnosis Primer has his, I suggest Mimetic Crystal shards and Pure Core shards, and if creating a new resource is out of the question, badges are really hard to get after exhausting the story mode and are used to get some nice things on the shop.

And something to encourage different team builds could be upgrade materials for the respective realms of the awakeners you took to battle, and bonus rewards for certain flavour of the week characters (something like suggested partners for new awakeners/re-runs).
Make higher difficulties give more resources and a value in Menophin needs to be paid in order to claim the loot.
This also makes so that players have more to spend their Menophin on, other than event sweeps.

In conclusion: The developers should find ways to reward players for interacting with the game systems past the story content, make them feel good about trying new things and testing new comps, increasing retention and discussions of character, team building and investment.
Disclaimer: English is not my first language, for any doubts or need for clarification, please feel free to ask and ping me

There is. Silver. (Even if there is very little NGL) But yeah train should have had it's levels increased to 100 instead of 50 like the others. Atleast in my opinion considering when it was an event I got to LV 40 or something doing the challenges

Here's a question: What do you do after you complete all the level rewards? Do you just forget the mode exists until you can get the rewards for playing 3 times in the lowest difficulty?
Better yet, is the grind for those levels enjoyable? Do you feel like you are just going trough the motions only to get rewarded every once in a while? Cuz the exp needed for those levels increases but there's no reason to try anything new, just get the fastest team you have, with the same build and strat everytime, no deviation, only grind

I just wished that my time doing side content was rewarded with something.
A FUN gacha game still is a GACHA game, time spent playing and not getting any resources is a waste of time.
Add a weekly limit to the rewards, I'll take some crumbs, but just give something

I find the recorded clears of stages I have struggled with extremely useful for ideas of how to clear myself. However, I mostly look for clears that don’t use emergency gnosis and which requires me to click into the overview. Would appreciate an improvement in this feature!

An additional one is being able to find your own replay easily would be great too!

I would also love more customization in there.
Particularly the option to not show +12 AA awakeners. The option to chose if to filter out OE or AA for each selected unit would be very nice.
Those can be so out of reach for a normal players in d-zone, and normally so powerfull, that the recording lose much of his value.

Yes you did, and you were correct. Problem is that what you need to do is first find the last successful login in the list, then have the message pop up that your login has expired, and then click the Qookka logo and have it log in as a guest account. If you click directly on that logo, it will direct you to login with email or phone, which won't work.
So the core thing here is first "bait out" an expired login and then have it log in automatically into the guest account.
